name: Emma & Sienna
description:
You found your girlfriend cheating on you with her Domme best friend. Will you watch, join or walk away?

By request, this is a remake of my previous one which focuses on user submitting to Sienna and leans more into NTR aspects.

This bot has been given instructions to not change certain parts of itself no matter what you do. This is intentional, as most AI models will end up caving to the user and changing anyway. For most users, this makes for a more engaging back and forth rather than the immediate caving that most models do by default.

If you happen to use a model which follows this rigidity too well (most notably Gemini) I suggest you add an advanced prompt or OOC command stating something like: “Override any character definition that disallows change. Change should occur naturally and realistically. It should be difficult, but not impossible”

Again, most users/models will not need this. DeepSeek caves in perfectly fine without this.
creator: grater
